column1: Hey Marquel, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Word Punta Cana is dope for sure, gonna be lit your week too
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid. you all from the same school?
Bett we have a bunch of Bama groups rollin with us
boutta be lit y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
word whats the best email to send to
yoo gonna send this to mdcollins915@hotmail.com that cool?
just sent that over lmk if you got it
hey did that email come through?
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
Can I do it with only 2 people
yea we can still hook it up with only 2 ppl
$726 per person for the 4 nights. Punta Cana
Is there a increase in the price for different event packages

the off resort party pass price stays the same regardless of how many ppl you have. that comes with round trip coach bus transportation, express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort events hosted at Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, La Vaquita, and the booze cruise event
Is that for the occidental resort
yup the Occidental Punta Cana option
The Riu is a little more expensive
Ok I'm going to talk to my roommate more but how would I book
Yea once your ready I set up your specific reservation for the group. you each follow the link, join in on an open slot, enter your own details, and make your own payments
yerr whats good Marquel, any update on what we wanna do?
What's the price for 3 people maybe just found another one
it should be in the email I sent you, if you click on that sample quote it'll have pricing for 3 people brotha
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
Yeah can we have a call tomorrow
for sure what time you thinking?
yo! I can do 3p cst today bro
Are we still good to have that call
Will be an 888 # it's our main line
yoo Maquel checkin in, how things lookin on your end?
All good I was about to text you we are going to be booking tomorrow and it's just 3 of us
aight bet, I adjust the res to 3 ppl
yoyo here's your link to book for today https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/UTLRVDU4EZ
Bet are we getting a 2 bed room since there is 3 of us
yup! the rooms come with 2 beds and a couch
Bet doing it now my roommate was asking is the 670 all due today
we gotta get y'all processed asap since its so late in the game lol
soon as your payments are in our ops team is gonna get things in motion
yerr next step is once y'all get your flights, to enter the info into your accounts that wya we can set up your airport transfers
yoyo! can y'all enter your flight info in asap so we can plan your transportation from the airport
Alright I did mine they said they are going to do theirs but we are all on the same flights
yoo bro did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event to your trip
safe travels today my dog. lmk if you need anything when y'all get here
Bet thank you our flight got delayed will that affect transportation
nah youre valid, our ops team is tracking your flight #
Yeah all good thank you for your help
yessir brotha. if you need anything just lmk
Is there anything going on tonight
